reason: Contains pro-caliphate hashtag (#أنصارالخلافة meaning 'Supporters of the Caliphate'), references to jihadist terminology ('mujahid sheikh'), and mentions of Ansar Bayt al-Maqdis, a known ISIS-affiliated group
